analysis_result: NES = 1.294, FDR q-val = 0.0994 (BCAT_BILD_ET_AL_UP in MPNST-G2 vs MPNST-G1 GSEA prerank); ES=0.408, nominal p=0.0994
denominator_used: N=13 MPNST RNA-Seq samples (6 MPNST_G1 + 7 MPNST_G2); gene set 'BCAT BILD ET AL UP' (49 genes, MSigDB C6)
assumptions_made: Signal-to-noise ranking metric; MPNST_G2 = phenotype (positive); permutation_num=1000, seed=42; M1933 excluded (not in RNA matrix); log-normalized expression from GSE207400_Matrix
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- Clinical: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx (108 rows), columns include Tumor_ID, Methylation_Group, RNA-Seq, RNA label
- RNA matrix: GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz (14,995 genes x 48 samples, log-normalized)

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Filter: Methylation_Group in {MPNST_G1, MPNST_G2} AND RNA-Seq == 'X'
- Intersected with RNA matrix columns by Tumor_ID
- MPNST_G1: 6 samples (M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M803)
- MPNST_G2: 6 samples (M1677, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413) -- M1933 excluded (not in matrix)

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Gene expression: log-normalized values from GSE207400_Matrix
- Phenotype: MPNST_G2 vs MPNST_G1 (G2 = positive/phenotype)

D. COMPUTATION
- Ranking: signal-to-noise (mean_G2 - mean_G1) / (std_G2 + std_G1), sorted desc
- Gene set: BCAT BILD ET AL UP from MSigDB_Oncogenic_Signatures (C6), 49 genes
- Method: gseapy.prerank, 1000 permutations, seed=42, min_size=5

E. RESULT
- NES = 1.2943
- FDR q-val = 0.0994
- ES = 0.4080
- Nominal p-val = 0.0994

F. CAVEATS
- 1 MPNST-G2 sample (M1933) excluded because RNA label (RT1933) not found in matrix
- Ranking metric is signal-to-noise; paper specific method may differ but standard for GSEA prerank
- 1000 permutations used; FDR has stochastic variance
- Gene set from MSigDB C6 'BCAT BILD ET AL UP' (49 genes)
